creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
ftp.net.ohio-state.edu persistently returns 500 status.
It is used by MASTER_SITE_XCONTRIB, defined in
Mk/bsd.sites.mk. It was last OK 2010-12-28, 17:48:00,
8 months ago.

Fix: 

I suggest removing ftp.net.ohio-state.edu from
Mk/bsd.sites.mk, i.e. remove from MASTER_SITE_XCONTRIB.
